text: VSTest cuts Newtonsoft.Json in .NET 11 Preview 4. Tests that quietly used the transitive copy break with FileNotFoundException.
Per-endpoint rate limiting in ASP.NET Core 11: when fixed window vs sliding window vs token bucket vs concurrency, plus the distributed-deploy gotcha everyone hits.
Building an MCP server in C# 14 on .NET 11 with the official 1.2 SDK. [McpServerTool], stdio, and the stderr logging fix.
SearchValues<T> in .NET 11: precompute once into a static readonly field, then watch IndexOfAny become 5x to 250x faster across SIMD kernels.
